case_title: THOMAS NATALE VS. SIGNATURE HOSPITALITY GROUP, LLC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY NATALE, THOMAS DBA DESIGN SOURCE INTERNATIONAL AS TO DEFENDANT SIGNATURE HOSPITALITY GROUP, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-29-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SIGNATURE HOSPITALITY GROUP, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATALE, THOMAS DBA DESIGN SOURCE INTERNATIONAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIGNATURE HOSPITALITY GROUP, LLC. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
